description: Initial screen state: Browser open to Askable Sessions page with screen sharing instructions.
frame_description: A dark grey web page with white text instructions for screen sharing is visible in the browser.

description: Task instructions are typed out on the screen, detailing a flight booking scenario.
frame_description: The central text on the dark background updates line by line, presenting the user's task.

description: User pauses to read the full task instructions before proceeding.
frame_description: The screen remains static with the full task instructions displayed while the user reads.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button to begin the task.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Open' button located at the bottom center of the instructional page.

description: The browser navigates to the Flight Centre homepage.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Holidays & Hotels
frame_description: The browser tab updates and the Flight Centre website begins to load.

description: Flight Centre homepage content finishes loading.
frame_description: The Flight Centre homepage is fully rendered, showing a search form and a 'UK & EUROPE SALE' banner.

description: User hovers over the 'Flights' navigation link.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the 'Flights' option in the main header menu.

description: The homepage hero banner automatically scrolls to the next promotional slide (Qantas Flights Sale).
frame_description: The large banner in the center of the page changes from a UK/Europe sale to a Qantas flights sale.

description: User clicks on the date selection field in the search widget.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the 'Returning' date input area of the search form.

description: The date picker modal appears on the screen after the user interacts with the date selection field.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The Flight Centre homepage with a date picker modal overlaying the search widget.

description: A date picker modal opens on top of the page.
frame_description: A modal titled 'Travel dates' appears, displaying calendars for February and March 2026.

description: User hovers over the 'One way' tab in the date picker modal.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'One way' toggle at the top of the date selection modal.

description: A promotional overlay appears over the date picker modal.
frame_description: A promotional overlay for World360 is visible over the date picker.

description: User hovers over the 'Return' tab in the date picker modal.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Return' toggle in the date selection modal.

description: User hovers over the close button of the date picker modal.
frame_description: The cursor is near the 'X' close icon in the top right of the 'Travel dates' modal.

description: The user clicks the close button on the promotional overlay.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'x' button of the promotional overlay.

description: The promotional overlay closes, and the date picker is visible again.
frame_description: The date picker modal is visible again after the promo is closed.

description: The user selects the 'One way' travel option in the date picker.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the 'One way' button in the date picker.

description: The user hovers the cursor over February 13th in the date picker.
frame_description: The cursor is over the date February 13th.

description: The user hovers the cursor over February 20th in the date picker.
frame_description: The cursor is over the date February 20th.

description: The user hovers over February 18th in the date picker.
frame_description: The cursor dwells on February 18th.

description: The user selects February 18th in the date picker.
frame_description: February 18th is highlighted as the selected date.

description: The user hovers over February 21st in the date picker.
frame_description: The cursor dwells on February 21st.

description: The user selects February 21st in the date picker.
frame_description: February 21st is highlighted as the selected return date.

description: The user hovers the cursor over March 26th in the date picker.
frame_description: The cursor is over the date March 26th.

description: The user hovers the cursor over March 28th in the date picker.
frame_description: The cursor is over the date March 28th.

description: The user clicks the 'Done' button in the date picker modal.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'Done' button at the bottom of the modal.

description: The date picker modal closes.
frame_description: The homepage is visible without the date picker modal.

description: The user clicks the 'Where to?' destination input field.
frame_description: The cursor clicks into the destination search box.

description: A destination suggestion dropdown appears.
frame_description: A list of popular destinations is shown below the input field.

description: The user hovers over the 'Melbourne, Australia' option in the suggestions list.
frame_description: The cursor is over the Melbourne suggestion.

description: The user selects 'Melbourne, Australia' from the dropdown.
frame_description: Melbourne is selected and the dropdown begins to close.

description: The destination dropdown closes and the field is populated.
frame_description: The search widget now shows Melbourne as the destination.

description: A 'Bonus Points' promotional banner appears.
frame_description: A banner with 'BONUS POINTS' text is visible below the search area.

description: The promotional banner content updates to a gift card advertisement.
frame_description: The banner now shows 'GIFT THEM THE WORLD' with a gift card image.

description: The user clicks the 'Search flights' button.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'Search flights' button.

description: The page begins navigating to the search results.
frame_description: The screen goes white as the new page begins to load.

description: A loading state appears on the search results page.
frame_description: A loading screen with a spinner is visible.

description: The search results page is in a loading state, showing a transition screen with cycling airline logos.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Search Results
frame_description: Loading screen with 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' and cycling airline logos.

description: The loading message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' appears.
frame_description: The loading screen displays a specific message about deals.

description: The flight search results start appearing on the screen.
frame_description: The first flight results are visible on the page.

description: Departing flight search results load and become visible.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Search Results
frame_description: Search results page showing flights from Sydney to Melbourne.

description: User clicks on the price button for the Qantas flight QF401.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Search Results
frame_description: Search results page with the cursor over the price button for the first flight.

description: The fare selection panel expands to show different fare options for the selected flight.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Search Results
frame_description: Fare selection panel expanded below the first flight option.

description: User clicks the select button for the 'Red Edeal' fare.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Search Results
frame_description: Fare selection panel with the cursor over the SELECT button for Red Edeal.

description: The fare selection is confirmed, and the button UI updates to a green checkmark.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Search Results
frame_description: Fare selection panel showing a green checkmark on the selected fare.

description: A loading screen appears as the system prepares to display return flight options.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Search Results
frame_description: Loading screen with 'Good choice!' and a spinner.

description: Return flight search results load and become visible.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Group - Search Results
frame_description: Search results page showing return flights from Melbourne to Sydney.

description: User scrolls horizontally through the flight search results to view more details.
frame_description: Flight Centre search results page showing return flights from Melbourne to Sydney.

description: User clicks on the first flight option (Virgin Australia, 6:00 AM) to view available fare types.
frame_description: Flight search results page; the first flight row is clicked.

description: The 'Select Returning Fare Type' section expands below the selected flight, revealing Lite, Choice, and Flex fare options.
frame_description: Fare options (Lite, Choice, Flex) are now visible for the selected flight.

description: User hovers over the 'Choice' fare option, likely comparing it with other tiers.
frame_description: Fare selection area with the 'Choice' option highlighted by the cursor.

description: User hovers over the 'Flex' fare option.
frame_description: Fare selection area with the 'Flex' option highlighted.

description: User hovers over the 'Flex' fare option again.
frame_description: Fare selection area with the 'Flex' option highlighted.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the 'Lite' fare option ($157).
frame_description: Fare selection area; the 'SELECT' button for the Lite fare is clicked.

description: The 'SELECT' button for the Lite fare changes to a green checkmark, indicating the flight and fare have been selected.
frame_description: Fare selection area showing the Lite fare as selected.

description: User performs a horizontal scroll on the flight results page.
frame_description: Flight search results page.

description: A loading overlay appears with the text 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...' and a progress spinner.
frame_description: Loading screen overlaying the search results.

description: Minor horizontal scroll adjustment during the loading transition.
frame_description: Loading screen.

description: The page navigates to the 'Review trip' screen.
frame_description: The 'Review trip' page loads, showing the selected flight details.

description: The 'Price summary' sidebar loads and becomes visible on the right side of the trip review page.
frame_description: Review trip page with the price summary sidebar visible.

description: User scrolls horizontally to the right to view the price summary sidebar.
frame_description: The 'Review trip' page is visible, showing flight details for Qantas and Virgin Australia. The price summary is on the right.

description: User scrolls horizontally on the trip review page.
frame_description: Review trip page showing flight and price details.

description: User scrolls further to the right.
frame_description: The price summary sidebar is now fully visible on the right side of the screen.

description: User scrolls down the page to the 'Add-ons' section.
frame_description: The page scrolls down to reveal the 'Baggage' and 'Seats' sections under 'Add-ons'.

description: User clicks on the 'SELECT SEATS' button to open the seat selector.
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue 'SELECT SEATS' button in the 'Seats' section.

description: A 'Loading seat selector' overlay with a spinner appears and then transitions to the seat map.
frame_description: A white overlay with the text 'Loading seat selector' and a red animated spinner is visible.

description: User hovers over seat 5E in the seat map.
frame_description: The seat map for Flight 1 is displayed. The cursor is positioned over seat 5E.

description: User selects seat 5E.
frame_description: Seat 5E is highlighted in the seat map.

description: A 'Preferred Seat' modal appears with seat details and a confirmation button.
frame_description: A modal titled 'Preferred Seat' is visible, showing a price of $28.00 and a 'CONFIRM SEAT' button.

description: User clicks 'CONFIRM SEAT' in the selection modal.
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue 'CONFIRM SEAT' button.

description: The selection modal closes and seat 5E is marked as selected (green) in the map.
frame_description: The seat map is visible again; seat 5E is now green.

description: User clicks 'NEXT FLIGHT' to select a seat for the second leg of the trip.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'NEXT FLIGHT' button at the bottom right of the seat selector.

description: The 'Loading seat selector' overlay appears and then transitions to the seat map for the second flight.
frame_description: The loading spinner is visible, followed by the seat map for Flight 2 (MEL to SYD).

description: Minor horizontal scroll adjustment.
frame_description: The seat map for Flight 2 is loading.

description: User hovers over seat 5E for the second flight.
frame_description: The cursor is over seat 5E in the second seat map.

description: User selects seat 5E for the second flight.
frame_description: Seat 5E is highlighted.

description: The 'Preferred Seat' modal appears for the second flight.
frame_description: The selection modal is visible over the seat map.

description: Click on the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button in the seat selection modal.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Book Flights, Hotels, Cruises & Holidays
frame_description: A seat selection modal is open over a seat map, showing seat 5E selected for $28.00.

description: The seat selection modal closes and the seat map updates to show seat 5E as selected.
frame_description: The seat map is visible again; seat 5E is green and the total price at the bottom has updated to $28.

description: Click on the 'DONE' button to exit the seat selector.
frame_description: The user is at the bottom of the seat selection interface.

description: User confirms the seat selection for the second flight.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button.

description: A 'Loading seat selector' message appears on screen.
frame_description: The seat map has disappeared, replaced by a loading message.

description: The UI updates to show the seat selection summary for both flights.
frame_description: The main booking page is visible, showing a 'Seats' section with two flights and their respective seat selections.

description: User clicks 'DONE' to exit the seat selector.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'DONE' button.

description: The seat selector closes and the 'Review trip' page is updated with the selected seat information.
frame_description: The 'Review trip' page is visible again, showing 'SYD - MEL Added: Preferred 5E' in the seats section.

description: Scroll down the page to view the Online Captain's Pack section.
frame_description: The page content is scrolling upwards to reveal lower sections.

description: Hover over the 'SELECT' button for the Waive Flight Centre's Cancellation Fee option.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over a blue SELECT button in the Online Captain's Pack section.

description: Click on the 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the page.
frame_description: The bottom of the page is visible with a large green CONTINUE button.

description: A loading screen appears with the text 'Thanks for confirming your flights'.
frame_description: A white screen with a blue loading spinner and confirmation text.

description: Navigate to the Traveller Details page.
frame_description: The Traveller Details page loads, showing form fields for passenger information.

description: Scroll down the Traveller Details page.
frame_description: The Traveller Details form is scrolling upwards.

description: Continue scrolling down the Traveller Details page.
frame_description: More of the Traveller Details form is revealed.

description: Scroll further down the Traveller Details page.
frame_description: The bottom of the Traveller Details form is coming into view.

description: Hover over the 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the Traveller Details page.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the green CONTINUE button at the bottom of the form.

description: Scroll to the bottom of the page.
frame_description: The page footer is visible.
